author: Matt
content: Eat here if you want to wait forever, get the wrong food, and get a $6ntd tea bag to make up for their mistake! Waited 20-25 min for clam chowder appetizer, 30 min for my burger, and 35 minutes later they brought out the wrong order for my girlfriend. She clearly stated her order so I have no idea how they brought out the wrong item. The manager came by and told us he would take our $90ntd twinnings tea bag off the bill to make up for my girlfriend not getting her dinner LOL. They could've offered her to keep the wrong item for free instead of taking it away, or give us the burger or clam chowder for free. Of course we didn't have time to wait another 35 minutes for the correct item. What a joke
